message:
fix: replace bdExec/bdRun package-level vars with BdCli struct to eliminate test races (gt-jrs6)

bdExec and bdRun were mutable package-level function variables used for
dependency injection in tests. installMockBd replaced these globals and
restored them in t.Cleanup, creating a fragile pattern where adding
t.Parallel() to any mock test would cause data races.

Replace the two global vars with a BdCli struct that wraps Exec and Run
functions. Thread *BdCli through all ~31 functions that use bd commands.
Tests now create local BdCli instances via mockBd()/fakeBd() instead of
mutating globals, making them safe for t.Parallel().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
